name: 300 Cash Loans
description_short: California payday lender with 3 physical locations offering $50–$1,000 cash advances with no hard credit check, guaranteed approval decisions, and next-business-day funding.
description_long:
300 Cash Loans is a small regional payday lending company operating brick-and-mortar locations across California, with branches in Escondido (San Diego County), El Dorado Hills (Sacramento County), and Agoura Hills (Los Angeles County). The Escondido branch, located at 960 Canterbury Place Suite 240, is managed by Patrick Wilcox and markets itself as a local business serving the surrounding 92025 community. The company operates seven days a week from 8am to 10pm, positioning itself as an accessible alternative to traditional banking for residents who need financial help outside standard business hours.

300 Cash Loans offers three core products at its Escondido location: payday loans, installment loans, and check cashing. Payday loans are short-term cash advances typically ranging from $50 to $1,000, repaid as a single lump sum by the borrower's next payday — generally within 30 days. Installment loans allow repayment spread across multiple payments. Approved funds are deposited via direct deposit as soon as the next business day. The company advertises no hard credit check through major bureaus and accepts applicants across the full credit spectrum, including those with poor or fair scores.

Several features distinguish 300 Cash Loans from purely digital lenders. The physical storefront model gives Escondido residents access to in-person service and a named branch contact (Patrick Wilcox, reachable at a direct phone and email). Extended seven-day operating hours — 8am to 10pm — make the branch accessible on weekends and evenings when banks are closed. The addition of check cashing alongside lending products makes it a broader financial services stop for underbanked consumers. The company also explicitly states it does not use hard credit bureau pulls, meaning applications will not negatively affect a borrower's credit score.

Honestly assessed, 300 Cash Loans serves a real need for credit-challenged consumers in specific California markets, but carries the high-cost risks inherent to all payday lending. The company's own website acknowledges that 'a payday advance has a high cost,' and the single-lump-sum repayment structure within 30 days can trap borrowers in renewal cycles if they cannot fully repay on time. Geographic reach is extremely narrow — only three California locations are listed — making this option irrelevant for consumers outside those markets. Active-duty military personnel are explicitly excluded under federal regulation. For Escondido-area residents with a genuine short-term emergency and no access to lower-cost credit, 300 Cash Loans is a fast and accessible option, but should be treated as a last resort.
pros: Open Monday–Sunday 8am–10pm, including weekends and evenings
No hard credit check through major bureaus — does not lower your credit score
Physical storefront with a named branch manager and direct contact number
Offers three products: payday loans, installment loans, and check cashing
Guaranteed approval decision — fast, low-friction application process
Accessible to borrowers with bad, fair, or no credit history
cons: Loan amounts capped at $1,000 — insufficient for larger emergencies
High cost: website explicitly warns payday advances carry high fees and APRs
Payday loans require single lump-sum repayment within ~30 days, increasing rollover risk
Only three locations, all in California — no option for consumers outside these markets
Active-duty military are excluded by federal law (Military Lending Act)
best_for: Escondido-area residents needing quick cash for car repairs, medical bills, or utility payments
Borrowers with poor or fair credit who cannot qualify for traditional personal loans
Consumers who prefer in-person service and need weekend or evening access
People needing small amounts ($50–$1,000) with same-day decision and next-day funding
diagnosis: 300 Cash Loans is best suited for Escondido-area residents with poor credit who need a small cash advance quickly and value in-person, seven-day-a-week service. The main caveat is cost: payday loans carry high APRs and must be repaid in a single lump sum within 30 days, making them a high-risk option for anyone without a clear repayment plan.
services: In-person branch service (Escondido, El Dorado Hills, Agoura Hills)
Emergency cash advances for car repairs, medical bills, and utility bills
